description: Evaluation cases for HPC Slurm job scaffolding skill

evals.prompt: I have a multi-node MPI model and want to run on an HPC cluster. Generate a Slurm job script.
evals.expected_output: Slurm batch script with MPI launch

evals.prompt: Set up a job array for 500 parameter combinations on a Slurm cluster.
evals.expected_output: Slurm array script with parameter indexing

evals.prompt: I need a GPU accelerated job on HPC. Generate Slurm script with CUDA support.
Generate HTCondor configuration for parameter sweeps
How do I run my simulation efficiently on a Slurm cluster?
Fix my Slurm script that is failing with node allocation errors
evals.expected_output: Debugged Slurm script with corrected directives

evals.prompt: Validate whether my Slurm job script is configured correctly
Write a bash script to run my simulation locally
Package my simulation into a Docker container
Run my job on a cluster
evals.expected_output: Clarifies scheduler and produces Slurm solution

evals.prompt: Generate a PBS job script for my simulation
Optimize my Slurm job to reduce runtime and queue wait
evals.expected_output: Improved resource configuration and scheduling guidance

evals.prompt: Fix formatting in my Slurm script
Create a Slurm job script but also prepare FAIR metadata for publication
evals.expected_output: Handles Slurm portion; does not overreach into FAIR

evals.prompt: I need to run 10,000 simulations with different parameters efficiently
evals.expected_output: Suggests job arrays or batching strategy
